name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using Sc.EXE
notes:
Detects the creation of a new service using the "sc.exe" utility.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: New Service Creation Using Sc.EXE
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of a new service using the "sc.exe" utility.


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using Sc.EXE on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of sc.exe
when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [create or binPath]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: New Service Creation Using Sc.EXE on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of sc.exe
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [create or binPath]
